title: The Fake Dweller [Horror]
body:
### 1.0 UPDATE IS COMING SOON... (maybe in this summer)


![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd22cd060eab854e7bf39fdac7d7951d05428ee2.png)

**READ BEFORE PLAYING!**

This mod can interact with your PC, but you can disable all of these unsafe features using /safemode command.

1. This mod CONTAINS loud sounds and screamers.
1. This mod CAN ban you from your world.
1. This mod CAN interact with your PC.
1. This mod CAN break your buildings and world.

**ABOUT MOD:**

The Fake Dweller is a horror mod that adds scary entities that will try to imitate popular horror mods.

It took me almost 1 year to develop it.
Also this mod is still in development, so it can be buggy.

**THIS MOD ADDS:**
1. 17 entities
1. 46 random events
1. 7 dimensions
1. 8 phases
1. 1 bossfight
1. a unique plot

IMPORTANT: Some shaders may cause visual issues. If you want to play this mod with shaders, _Hysteria Shaders_ are the best option.

There are also several models and sounds in this mod that do NOT belong to me, and I do NOT claim any authorship of them, all rights belong to them: _idk_someguy, GamerCraftZ, Flamc04 and M_Productions._

**MOD IS SINGLEPLAYER OLNY NOW!**

**MOD NEEDS GECKOLIB!**

**IF YOU FIND ANY BUGS OR ERRORS, PLEASE WRITE TO artmsrd1337@gmail.com**
